content: Phase 1: Set up EMERGENT_LLM_KEY, build LLM provider abstraction (Claude Sonnet 4.5)
Phase 1: Write test_core.py proving briefing generation + structured action JSON + file summarization
Phase 1: Run & fix test_core.py until all 3 POC checks pass reliably
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design_agent
Phase 2: Backend - schema/models, services (briefing engine, action queue, memory, files, chat, devices), connectors, auth+demo, seed Hetul
Phase 2: Frontend - 11 screens (Auth, Onboarding, Today, Talk, Action Queue, Memory, Connected Accounts, Devices, Routines, Files, Settings) + Kaelra orb shell
Phase 2: End-to-end testing via testing_agent_v3 + fix all bugs
